title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced "Senior Full Stack Developer" The job is hybrid, we expect the candidates to be in İstanbul. Join us if you have a penchant to develop solutions with cutting-edge applications for a better world. What Are The Required Qualifications? Bachelor's Degree in Computer Engineering or related fields 3+ years of professional software development experience with Java and React.js Candidates with hands-on experience in banking projects will be given preference Strong experience with Spring Framework using Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Session, and Spring Data Experience HTML, CSS, Javascript, Typescript Experience with Git, Maven Experience with Unit Test Frameworks Experience with SQL, NoSQL DB, JPA, and Hibernate Experience with RESTful API Design, SOAP, and XML Knowledge of Object-Oriented Programming Ability to think creatively in problem-solving, debugging, object-oriented design, data structures, and algorithms Ability to clearly communicate with peers, Business Analysts, and Subject Matter Experts Taking ownership of your work by meeting deadlines, foreseeing delays, and raising issues appropriately Ability to work collaboratively in a team setting Experience in Agile Development methodologies is a plus (Scrum, Kanban, etc.) For details: Visit: www.innovance.com.tr Follow us on LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/innovance-consultancy Follow us on Instagram: www.instagram.com/innovanceconsultancy Follow us on Medium: www.medium.com/innovance-company-blog Follow us on X: https://x.com/Innovance2017

title: Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack)
description: Who Are We? Profen, founded in 1995, is a global company that offers products and services to the Communication Technologies, Defense Technologies, Teleport & Satellite Network Services, Media & Broadcasting sectors with its growing R&D center. PROFEN, headquartered in Istanbul, offers innovative and high-tech solutions with its Ankara and Konya offices. PROFEN continues its activities by offering solutions in the following areas: Telecommunication Infrastructures Satellite Ground Segment Systems Data Center Design and Installation Defense Technologies Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or related disciplines 7+ years of professional Java experience in web-based technologies (design, development, and maintenance) Hands-on experience with Java 8, 11, 17, and 21 Proficient in Git and Maven Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with Amazon AWS Strong experience with relational databases (RDBMS), preferably PostgreSQL Proven experience in SQL query optimization Full-stack development experience with Angular or React on the front-end Solid understanding of RESTful JSON APIs, SOA, and Event-Driven Architectures Experience with container technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, or OpenShift Familiarity with messaging platforms (Kafka, EMS, ActiveMQ, and/or IBM MQ) Experience with monitoring and alerting tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and ElasticSearch Preferably experienced in the aviation MRO / logistics domain Ability to read and understand technical documentation in English Job Description Design and develop required enhancements for the existing visioMAX software Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve software defects and performance issues Write and maintain unit and integration test codes Collaborate closely with users and stakeholders to understand software requirements and user needs Manage cloud-based and on-premise deployment, maintenance, and operational support processes Take an active role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications

title: SENIOR DEVELOPER (BACKEND)
description: Turkcell olarak yeteneklerimize eşsiz insan deneyimi yaşatarak, değer yaratan sürdürülebilir bir organizasyon inşa etmeyi ve işveren markamızı zirveye taşımayı hedefliyoruz. Bu hedef doğrultusunda benimsediğimiz değerlerimizi iş yapış biçimlerimize yansıtıyoruz. Turkcell’de Neye Değer Veriyoruz? İnsan Odaklılık: Eşsiz insan deneyimi oluşturmak amacıyla uygulamalarımızın merkezinde insanı konumluyor, çalışanlarımızın potansiyelini en üst düzeye çıkarmayı ve onların yeteneklerini geliştirmeyi hedefliyoruz. Yenilik: İnsanların hayatında fark yaratan yenilikçi çözümler üretmek, fikir ve teknolojileri keşfetmek için tutkulu bir şekilde çalışıyoruz. 🚀 Mükemmellik: Dahil olduğumuz ve temas ettiğimiz her noktada mükemmelliyeti hedefliyor, kendimize yüksek standartlar belirliyor, olağanüstü sonuçlar elde ediyoruz. 🎯👌🏼 İş Birliği: Başarının anahtarı olarak birlikte çalışmayı, saygı ve şeffaflık kültürünü teşvik ediyoruz. 👥🔗🧩 Müşteri Odaklılık: Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını merkeze koyarak olağanüstü müşteri deneyimleri sunmayı hedefliyoruz. 🤝🖇️ Sürdürülebilirlik: Müşterilerimiz, çalışanlarımız ve dünyamız için sürdürülebilir bir gelecek amacıyla çalışıyoruz. 🌍 Ne Bekliyoruz? Üniversitelerin ilgili 4 yıllık bölümlerinden mezun, Minimum 3 yıl Java ve Spring Boot Framework deneyimi olan, REST /SOAP/gRPC/Stateless API ve microservice mimarilerinde tecrübeli, Caching metodolojilerine hakim (Redis+), Search domain teknolojileri (ElasticSearch, RedisSearch plus) hakkında bilgi sahibi, Event-driven mimari konusunda deneyimli (Kafka+), Unit test süreçlerine hakim, CI/CD araçlarında tecrübeli, Container mimariler üzerinde çalışma deneyimli (Docker, Kubernetes, Openshift), Çevik çalışma yöntemlerini (Scrum/Kanban) benimsemiş, Yatay organizasyon yapısında, çevik bir ekip kültürüne uyum sağlayabilen, Planlı olan, sürekli öğrenen ve öğrendiklerini paylaşan, Yüksek trafik alan uygulamalarda deneyim kazanmayı isteyen, Bireysel motivasyonu yüksek, öğrenmeye ve gelişime açık, takım çalışmasına yatkın, Güçlü analitik düşünme, problem çözme ve inisiyatif alma becerisine sahip, İnovatif bakış açısıyla yaratıcı çözümler üretebilen, Sözlü ve yazılı iletişim becerileri güçlü. Turkcell’de Senior Developer Rolü Ne Yapar? Turkcell Dijital Kanallar üzerinden yürütülen geliştirmelerin teknik tasarım ve yazılım süreçlerinden sorumludur, Mimari kararlara yön verecek teknolojik trendleri takip eder performans gereksinimlerini belirler, Ürün geliştirme sürecinin uçtan uca kalitesine katkı sağlar ve test süreçlerini destekler, Servislerin geliştirilmesi, hatalarının giderilmesi, KPI takibi ve operasyonel devir süreçlerinden sorumludur, Geliştirilen uygulamaların devreye alınma süreçlerini koordine eder ve gerektiğinde teknik destek verir, Ürün ve çözümlerin yazılım mimarisini, teknik ve fonksiyonel yol haritasını belirler, tüm yazılım ve geliştirme yaşam döngüsünden (SDLC - yaratılması, yaşatılması ve gerektiğinde dönüştürülmesi ya da sonlandırılması) sorumludur, Müşteri iş ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda, ürün ve çözümleri geliştirir. İş birimlerinden gelen taleplerin tasarım-geliştirme safhalarının müşteri odaklı ve rekabete uygun hızda ardı ardına geliştirilmesini sağlar, Sorumlusu olduğu altyapılar ile ilgili süreçlere ilişkin ihtiyaçların analiz incelemesini (review’unu) gerçekleştirir, teknik tasarımları oluşturur, proje planlarını detaylandırır, geliştirme (development) fazını yürütür ve test destek aşamalarında görev alır. Devreye alım sonrası destek ve kod değişikliği gerektiren konularda ilgili yazılımların gerçekleştirilmesinden sorumludur, Sorumlu olduğu sistemler ve geliştirmeler için gerekli olan yatırım bütçesini planlar ve yürütür, Uygulanabilir teknoloji, ürün ve çözümlerin oluşturulmasına yönelik öncelikle Turkcell Grup ihtiyacının yaratılması ve ticari çözümlerin geliştirilmesi ve uygulanmasından sorumludur, AR-GE vizyonu kapsamında ürünleştirme fırsatlarını bütünsel bir bakış açısı ile gözetir ve gerekli yatırımlara karar verir, Sorumluluk alanındaki vizyon, hedef ve stratejileri belirler, Uygulama yol haritalarının ve uygulama planının gerektirdiği kararlarının alınmasını sağlar ve takibini yapar. Yan Haklar ve Faydalar Ekibimizin bir üyesi olarak, rekabetçi bir ücret, esnek çalışma düzenlemeleri, kariyer gelişimi ve ilerleme fırsatları gibi bir dizi yan hak ve fayda ile buluşma fırsatı yakalayacaksın. Detaylara "https://bit.ly/TurkcellTKusagi’’ üzerinden ulaşabilirsin. 🎁▶️ *Turkcell bir eşit fırsat işverenidir ve ırka, renge, dine, cinsiyete, ulusal kökene, etnik kökene, yaşa, fiziksel görünüşe veya duruma, medeni durumuna, askerlik durumuna bakılmaksızın, tüm nitelikli başvuru sahiplerini istihdam için değerlendirmeye alır.

title: Backend Developer (12 Month-Fixed Term Contract)
description: At Flormar, we were born in Milan in the 1950s; growing and evolving in Turkey’s multicultural, vibrant world, we have become a global brand that adds color to beauty. Since the day we were founded, we have prioritized the joy women get from makeup and how it makes them feel good, while working to make beauty accessible to everyone. With our products, through clean ingredients, our cruelty-free policy and our sustainable production approach, we make a difference not only in beauty but also in values. Today, in more than 70 countries, with nearly 60,000 online & offline sales points from chain perfumeries to our website, from marketplaces to our stores, from catalog sales to wholesale channels, we reach and inspire millions of people. All our production processes and logistics operations are carried out at our factory and logistics center in Gebze. Our headquarters are located at Akasya Business Towers in Üsküdar, Istanbul. At Flormar, our journey is shaped by our values. At every step, we act with passion, proud of everything we do, seize opportunities with agility, and make sustainable contributions to the future. Because for us, this is not just a workplace; it is the way to touch lives and color the future together! Key Competencies That Will Make You Stand Out 3+ years of professional backend development with .NET (C#), Solid experience building RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core (Web API), Comfortable developing and maintaining .NET console applications for scheduled jobs, data processing, and ETL tasks, Proficiency in SQL Server — query writing, stored procedures, and basic schema design, Experience consuming and exposing third-party APIs (REST); familiarity with JSON and XML data formats, Understanding of OOP principles, clean code practices, and basic design patterns (Repository, Service layer), Daily Git usage; comfortable with pull requests and branch-based workflows, NET 6+ / ASP.NET Core Web API · C# · Entity Framework Core, SQL Server · T-SQL · stored procedures, REST API design and consumption · JSON / XML, Task scheduling: Windows Task Scheduler, Hangfire, or similar, Basic understanding of authentication: JWT, API keys, Git, UiPath: Hands-on RPA development experience with UiPath Studio — building attended or unattended automation workflows, Familiarity with UiPath Orchestrator for bot deployment and monitoring, Experience with ERP system integrations (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, or similar), Exposure to message queues or event-driven patterns (RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus), Reliable, delivery-focused developer who works well under defined timelines, Good communicator — able to work with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, Comfortable picking up existing codebases and contributing quickly. What to Expect in This Role Design and develop .NET-based APIs , Develop console applications to support internal systems, Contribute to and support integration pipelines, Work on solutions that support internal system integrations, Experience with RPA tools is a plus, but not required. What Awaits You in Flormar’s Colorful World? Work from anywhere for three weeks each year thanks to our flexible working model. Start your weekends early during the summer with Happy Fridays. Celebrate your birthday wherever you like with your birthday leave. Enjoy the option of working remotely for a full year after maternity leave. Benefit from two weeks of paid paternity leave to create unforgettable memories with your growing family. Contribute to projects that make the world a better place with our social responsibility leave. Bring your passions into work life with our F Social clubs. Add colorful breaks and joyful moments to your day with Colorful Hours. Shape your own development journey: Udemy Business, Flormar Development Catalogue, leadership development programs and much more with you. At Flormar, every new day is an opportunity to learn, discover and shine! Are you ready to join us? As Flormar, we adopt the principle of equal opportunity and equal behavior in education and recruitment. All applicants who applies to our job ads will be considered for employment; regardless to race, sex , color or social origin, ethnicity religion, pregnancy, disability, sexual orientation gender expression or political opinion

title: Full Stack Developer (.NET Core)
description: 📍 Konum: Ankara – Ofisten Çalışma 🏢 Şirket: FinexSoftware 🕒 Çalışma Şekli: Tam Zamanlı FinexSoftware olarak geliştirdiğimiz projelerde görev alacak, modern teknolojilerle çalışmayı seven ve AI araçlarını etkin kullanabilen bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Geliştirdiğimiz projelerde .NET Core, MVC, Azure gibi teknolojileri aktif olarak kullanıyoruz. Yazılım geliştirmenin yanında sistem ve network tarafında temel bilgi sahibi olan ekip arkadaşlarıyla çalışmayı tercih ediyoruz. 🛠 Teknik Gereksinimler • Minimum 2 yıl yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi • .NET Core / ASP.NET MVC ile proje geliştirme deneyimi • C#, JavaScript, Kendo UI, Tailwind, Bootstrap ve modern web teknolojileri konusunda iyi seviyede bilgi • SQL Server ile çalışma deneyimi • Azure servisleri hakkında temel bilgi • AI araçlarını (ChatGPT, Claude vb.) geliştirme süreçlerinde etkin kullanabilme • Balsamiq, Figma vb. araçlarla arayüz tasarlayıp bunu koda dökebilme • Temel sistem ve network bilgisi o IIS üzerinde uygulama yayınlama ve temel konfigürasyon bilgisi o Web uygulamalarının çalıştığı server ortamlarını anlayabilme o HTTP/HTTPS, domain, DNS gibi temel web altyapı kavramlarına hakimiyet o Linux sunucu yönetimi ve temel komut bilgisi o Docker container kullanımı ve yönetimi o Redis temel bilgisi ve kullanım deneyimi • Mevcut kod tabanını analiz edip geliştirebilecek ve problem çözme odaklı düşünebilen • Mevcut projeleri hızlı anlayıp projeye hızlı adaptasyon sağlayabilme

title: Frontend & React Native Developer (12 Month-Fixed Term Contract)
description: At Flormar, we were born in Milan in the 1950s; growing and evolving in Turkey’s multicultural, vibrant world, we have become a global brand that adds color to beauty. Since the day we were founded, we have prioritized the joy women get from makeup and how it makes them feel good, while working to make beauty accessible to everyone. With our products, through clean ingredients, our cruelty-free policy and our sustainable production approach, we make a difference not only in beauty but also in values. Today, in more than 70 countries, with nearly 60,000 online & offline sales points from chain perfumeries to our website, from marketplaces to our stores, from catalog sales to wholesale channels, we reach and inspire millions of people. All our production processes and logistics operations are carried out at our factory and logistics center in Gebze. Our headquarters are located at Akasya Business Towers in Üsküdar, Istanbul. At Flormar, our journey is shaped by our values. At every step, we act with passion, proud of everything we do, seize opportunities with agility, and make sustainable contributions to the future. Because for us, this is not just a workplace; it is the way to touch lives and color the future together! Key Competencies That Will Make You Stand Out 3+ years of professional development with at least one published app on App Store and Google Play Solid experience building production web applications with Next.js (App Router or Pages Router) Hands-on experience with Shopify Storefront API (GraphQL) — product listing, cart, checkout, and order management Strong TypeScript skills across both web and mobile codebases React Navigation, Redux Toolkit or Zustand, REST & GraphQL API consumption Comfortable configuring native modules (Xcode / Android Studio) and mobile build pipelines (Fastlane, GitHub Actions, or similar) Familiarity with cart flows, checkout, payment gateway integration, and order tracking React Native 0.72+ · Expo (managed and bare workflow) · TypeScript Next.js 14+ · React · Tailwind CSS · Server Components / SSR / SSG Shopify Storefront API (GraphQL) · Shopify Mobile Buy SDK Push notifications (FCM / APNs) · Deep linking · Secure token management Unit & integration testing: Jest, React Native Testing Library, Playwright Shopify Hydrogen / Remix headless storefront experience Vercel deployment and edge functions familiarity Analytics / feature flag SDKs (Firebase Analytics, LaunchDarkly, etc.) Background in fashion, beauty, or retail e-commerce Ownership mindset — drives features from design through to release Collaborative and communicative; works well with designers, backend devs, and product managers Comfortable in an Agile / Scrum environment; proactive about surfacing blockers What to Expect in This Role Develop a cross-platform mobile commerce application using React Native Build and maintain the web storefront using Next.js Integrate both mobile and web applications with Shopify Storefront API Ensure seamless functionality between themobile app and web storefront Contribute to the development of a modern and scalable e-commerce platform What Awaits You in Flormar’s Colorful World? Work from anywhere for three weeks each year thanks to our flexible working model, Start your weekends early during the summer with Happy Fridays, Celebrate your birthday wherever you like with your birthday leave, Enjoy the option of working remotely for a full year after maternity leave, Benefit from two weeks of paid paternity leave to create unforgettable memories with your growing family, Contribute to projects that make the world a better place with our social responsibility leave, Bring your passions into work life with our F Social clubs, Add colorful breaks and joyful moments to your day with Colorful Hours, Shape your own development journey: Udemy Business, Flormar Development Catalogue, leadership development programs and much more with you. At Flormar, every new day is an opportunity to learn, discover and shine! Are you ready to join us? title: Senior Front-End Developer (React/Next.js)
description: We are looking for a passionate and skilled Front-End Developer to join our project team in the e-commerce domain as an outsource partner. You will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and optimizing front-end applications using modern technologies such as React and Next.js. Responsibilities Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams (design, back-end, product) to deliver end-to-end solutions. Develop scalable, maintainable, and user-friendly front-end applications. Implement responsive designs and ensure high performance across different devices and browsers. Troubleshoot and resolve issues to improve overall user experience. Contribute ideas and solutions that add value to the project and improve development practices. Stay up-to-date with the latest front-end trends, technologies, and best practices, sharing knowledge with the team. Qualifications Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science Min 7 years of experience as a Front-End Developer, preferably in e-commerce or large-scale projects. Strong knowledge and hands-on experience with React.js and Next.js. Solid understanding of modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles. Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, or similar). Familiarity with RESTful APIs or GraphQL integrations. Knowledge of version control systems (Git) and agile development practices. Ability to analyze and solve problems effectively, working independently when needed. Good command of level of English (written and spoken).

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer ' Digital Channels'
description: About: Yapı Kredi Technology is a technology company that produces innovative, high quality, and high value-added products and solutions in the finance sector. With more than 2,000 employees, it aims to create products that will shape the sector for Yapı Kredi Bank and to be the undisputed leader in the field of technology by using modern architectural systems and cloud technologies. It also contributes to the development of new and exemplary products for the sector by using natural language processing, machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data mining technologies with its R&D team. Who We Are: At Yapı Kredi Technology, we research with passion, wonder as we learn, and implement innovations that shape the future together. We take responsibility from the first day with our expert colleagues and work with all our strength for pioneering applications. We make quick decisions and take action. We quickly adapt to innovations and changes. What Do We Offer: 📌 Opportunity to work in hybrid model 💻Opportunity to work in Koç Group Community Companies' offices 🌴Chance to discover the natural wonders and amenities offered at Koç Toplululuğu Spor Kulübü (KTSK) 🚀Career development opportunities in a structured technology career path 💫 Opportunity to benefit from BizClub and KoçAilem privileges exclusive to Yapı Kredi Technology employees 🤝Company-contributed individual retirement insurance 🎂 Birthday off day Qualifications BS or MS degree in Computer Science or in Computer Engineering Minimum 4+ years of professional software development experience, Object oriented development knowledge and coding experience in Java and Web technologies. Knowledge of Spring MVC Rest, Spring Boot, JPA & Hibernate. Experience with GIT & Maven. Some coding abilities to be able to prototype ideas quickly (CSS, JavaScript & HTML preferable). An enthusiasm to learn and understanding new technologies such as Blockchain & APIs. Experience of developing Service Oriented Architecture (SOA) and Integration platform. Knowledge on Oracle Databases and Data Models. Good team player, result oriented attitude and analytical mind. Strong communicational and interpersonal skills. Job Description A work culture focused on innovation and creating lasting value for our customers. Contribute in all phases of the development lifecycle. Write reusable, well-documented code with clean integration interfaces and structure. Develop high-volume, low-latency applications for critical systems, delivering high-availability and performance. Analyzes and recommends new procedures and techniques to improve the supported systems. Follow and execute on CI/CD practices for the products. Interact with various IT teams and share knowledge effectively with all stakeholders. Candidate Selection Process: Our recruitment process for all positions typically encompasses technical interviews, director assessments, competency evaluations, and personality tests. We will extend our offer to candidates who have successfully completed a positive evaluation process. 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesinden doğan haklarınıza ve bu konudaki detaylı bilgiye https://kariyerim.yapikredi.com.tr/Account/StaticKvkk adresinde yer alan aydınlatma metnimizden ulaşabilirsiniz.

title: Backend Engineer - Go Developer
description: Lifemote Networks At Lifemote, we build AI-driven Wi-Fi Analytics tools that help Internet Service Providers gain visibility into the quality of connectivity at customers' homes and create proactive solutions. Lifemote helps transform how Internet Service Providers access home connectivity data, complement their first and second line of Customer Service operations, and create value by driving up customer satisfaction at home. Comprising a vibrant and youthful group of professionals, Lifemote boasts expertise in the realm of Wi-Fi Analytics. Our solution has been successfully deployed on over 6 million devices spanning 7 European countries. Our team is rapidly expanding in tandem with our ambitious aspirations for the future. We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our team and help us build solid products. The design and development of scalable, reliable backend services and their maintenance require the fine craftsmanship of skillful backend engineers. They are pillar stones of our company; they give life to and nourish our highly anticipated and highly acclaimed product. As the old adage goes: "The Backend giveth and the Backend taketh away" About the Position Must-Have Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals Have +2 years of software development experience Highly eager to learn and quick learner Experienced with Go and/or Kotlin Proficient in concurrency concepts and async programming Experienced in REST and gRPC API design and development Experienced in Relational DBMS like MySQL Experienced with Git version control system Experience with unit testing, integration testing, and load testing Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines Strong collaboration skills, system thinking, and ability to clearly explain complex concepts Self-motivated and self-managing with strong organizational skills Strong English language communication skills Nice to Have (one or more) Experience with Quarkus framework Experience working with cloud services particularly AWS Understanding of infrastructure as code using Terraform Fundamental understanding of computer networks, as the role requires frequent interaction with network-related concepts and tasks Basic experience with frontend technologies like React and TypeScript Responsibilities Design and implement scalable, reliable, maintainable backend services Troubleshoot and debug applications Design and implement scalable, reliable, maintainable backend services. Stand up for improvements to software quality, security, and performance. Troubleshoot and debug applications. Champion testing, reusability, and readability within the development team. Encourage innovation and foster an environment of continuous improvement. Maintain in-depth knowledge of the organization's technologies and architectures. What You'll Achieve? The realm of ISP technology is vast, dynamic, and ever-evolving. Each day, you'll dive into the exciting waves of Wi-Fi and in-home Wi-Fi analytics. And guess what? This adventure doesn't have an expiration date. Over two decades and beyond, there will always be something new to explore and master. But that's not all. As a key contributor to the industry, you'll shine brightly in the spotlight, building enduring relationships with leaders across various domains – from the technical realm to the business sphere and everything in between. Your influence will span industries and continents, making your mark on the future of connectivity. What's in it for you? We will provide you with a competitive salary, stock option plan, competitive private health insurance coverage, and a lunch card. You will have access to an online training platform and get funding for conferences & events. You will be able to work with clients from the Netherlands, Norway, Austria, the UK, and worldwide.Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Lifemote!

Technolo gies: Java, Spring, Hibernate, SpringBoot, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, Kafka/RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch & Kibana, C#, .NetArchitectural appr oach: Microservices with CQRS and event sourcing, Cloud Native Comp uting What We OfferHealth Ins uranceMea l cardTransport All owanceTraining BudgetGif t CardBirthday LeaveHapp y Hour

title: Backend Developer
description: MNG Airlines is looking for a Backend Developer to be assigned in the Digital & Process Excellence Director Education and experience requirements for applicants: Based In Ankara Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (Preferably Computer Engineering, Software Engineering or related disciplines) Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills Good command of the written and oral English language, To be successful in human relations and to be prone to teamwork, Minimum 2 years of experience in backend development. Technical Competencies Experience with .NET Core, C#, MVC, Entity Framework and MS SQL, Strong knowledge of Object-Oriented Programming and design patterns Knowledge of code, software and information security standards, Experience in developing SOAP API, RESTful-based API services, Experience of developing code on a version control system (GIT, Azure DevOps, etc...) Key Responsible: Development and maintaining of .NET-based applications for company projects, Implementing the software development process (including coding, testing and distributed) Resolving software-related errors and issues in a timely manner by debugging and fixing errors, Continuously improving software development processes and technologies, and keeping up with industry trends.

title: Backend Developer
description: *This is a fully REMOTE position* **Only full-time position is available.** **USD indexed salary.** About Us Throughout last year, Scorp Inc. has made a big leap and reached over 100 million users with over 10 mobile products! We continue to grow and develop new social apps. As our userbase grows, there comes the challenge of scaling. With this challenge, we've recently started the search for amazing people to extend our team. We're looking for engineers who are excited about the challenge of building and scaling systems that serve information 24/7 for MILLIONS of daily active users worldwide. We present you the opportunity to become a part of our talented team and have direct access to work on large-scale systems that reach millions of people, daily. If you enjoy dealing with large-scale problems, ambitious to solve challenging problems and want your work to reach a massive global audience, you are an ideal candidate for our team. Requirements: A reputable college degree in Computer Engineering, CS or Mathematics Min 5+ years' experience in backend development Motivated to create stable and scalable projects with a team Experience in an Agile development environment Experience in SQL, NoSQL, and in-memory database systems Experience in backend services and distributed systems Nice to haves (not required but a plus): Python, Node.js Familiarity with some frontend technologies. Why Scorp Inc.? 🚀 Join Our Team, Enjoy the Perks! 🌟 We’re not just a company—we’re a community that values growth and happiness! Here’s what you can look forward to when you join us: 🏡 Remote Work Option – Enjoy flexibility and comfort! 💰 USD-Indexed Salary 🌎 Being a Part of a Hyper-Growth Global Startup – Build the future with a dynamic team! 🚀 Endless Self-Improvement Opportunities for Managing High-Scale Problems – We’re building large-scale systems that used by millions! Keep learning and evolving! 🌍 Multicultural Work Environment – Be inspired by diverse perspectives! 🌟 Contribute to Innovative Local & Global Projects – Grow both personally and professionally while making an impact! 📚 Education Budget – We invest in your continuous learning and development. 🧘 ♂️ Meditopia: PT, Dietitian & Therapy Support – Take care of both body and mind! 🍽️ Meal Allowance – Enjoy delicious breaks on us! 🎯 Seamless Onboarding Process with a Scorpion Buddy: A Warm Welcome & Smooth Transition! 🎉 Social clubs, celebrations, and events to help you balance work and fun. Join us and grow together! 💼🚀 💼 Our Interview Process 📝 HR Interview – We get to know you and your career goals better. 🧠 Case Study – A real challenge awaits where you can showcase your skills! 💻 Technical Interview – We assess your technical expertise and experience with our team. At the same time, it’s also a great chance for you to get a feel for how we work and what kind of teammates you’ll be collaborating with. 🎭 VP Culture Fit Interview – We explore the alignment of our values and work culture together. 🎉 Offer Stage – Congratulations! You're now ready to become a part of our team. LinkedIN üzerinden elektronik olarak ileteceğiniz kişisel bilgileriniz, 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ve ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde, Scorp tarafından yalnızca Şirketimizden talep ettiğiniz hizmetlerin sunulabilmesi ve bu hizmetlerin sürekliliğinin sağlanması amaçlarıyla saklanabilecek, işlenebilecek ve verilen servisin gerektirdiği hallerde yurtiçinde ve yurtdışında yerleşik 3. kişilerle paylaşılabilecek olup, kişisel verileriniz hiçbir şekilde hukuka ve dürüstlük kuralına aykırı şekilde başkaları ile paylaşılmayacak ve işleme sebebi dışında başka amaçlarla kullanılmayacaktır. Kişisel verileriniz yalnızca işleme amacının gerekli kıldığı süre boyunca saklanacak olup talebiniz üzerine silinecek veya imha edilecektir. Bu işe başvurarak, özgeçmişinizin veri tabanımızda yer almasını kabul etmiş olduğunuzu bildirmek isteriz.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: A Bit About Us... Please allow us to celebrate our own success for a moment... We've built a customer-centric product that is market-leading, and we are smashing it! We're a multi-award-winning digital payments and insight platform within the automotive industry. We work with over 5,000 automotive retailers, helping drivers to pay for motoring costs, accessories, and other services through a variety of different payment options. Our purpose is to build a solution that gives drivers peace of mind while enhancing customer experience and assisting with dealer profitability. Bumper is a fast-growing payments scale-up and we’re excited to continue building on our growth having completed a successful Series B funding round in 2024. We’re looking to hire a dynamic and passionate Senior Backend Engineer , based in Ankara . Our Head Office is in Sheffield City Centre, with offices also based in London and Turkey. We've also expanded further, bringing retailers in Ireland, Germany, Spain, and the Netherlands on board, with the vision of being the leading automotive payment and insights platform! As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will report directly to the Team Lead and play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining our backend systems to ensure the functionality and scalability of our platform. Responsibilities Collaborating closely with teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions, Design, develop, and implement high-quality, scalable, and maintainable backend systems and APIs, Conducting code reviews to ensure code quality, performance, and adherence to best practices, Providing timely solutions to troubleshoot complex technical issues, debug them, and minimize their impact on the platform, Being able to divide work into small outputs and actively delegate work to more than one team member, Mentoring young engineers by encouraging a culture of continuous learning and growth within the team, Staying abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends by proposing and implementing innovative solutions to enhance the capabilities of our platform. Qualifications Having at least 5 years advanced knowledge of Python and Django, At least five years of experience working with SQL databases, Expert in software design principles and experience in REST APIs, Practice using Git and the ability to overcome technical problems encountered in Git, etc., Expert level knowledge of a functional area of Bumper or a language, framework, or part of the technology stack we use to build Bumper, Have strong oral and written communication skills in English. Now a Bit About You… We are a passionate and professional team, and we’re excited to welcome a Senior Backend Engineer who shares our vision of making Bumper the leading automotive payment and insights platform! In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment where data-driven decision-making is at the heart of everything we do . You’ll play a key role in designing scalable systems, improving our architecture, and collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to deliver robust backend solutions. If you thrive on solving complex technical challenges, enjoy working with modern technologies, and have a proactive mindset when it comes to building efficient systems , we’d love to hear from you! What You'll Get From Us... Competitive Salary Private Health Insurance We give 26 days holiday + bank holidays, plus volunteer days throughout the year (pro-rated) For all your well-being and development needs, we give each colleague access to a Wellbeing platform, with an allowance of £250 per year £200 monthly meal allowance to enjoy delicious food while you work your magic £25 monthly budget to spend at our amazing team events – fun guaranteed! Our Bumper Flex policy for better work/life balance (3 days in office) Annual company-wide Bumper Retreat—a few days of fun, collaboration, and mingling(make sure your passport’s in date!) Perks are nice, but we know perks don’t make up the whole package of a great job. By joining our Bumper team, you'll have the opportunity to be an ambassador for our product & brand, and help us to continue on our winning streak!

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are currently seeking a Full Stack Developer for a project we provide consultancy services to. Requirements Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field, Preferably at least 3 years of experience in product development and production deployment within aB2B SaaS startup building AI-focused products, Hands-on experience in designing, developing, and maintaining end-to-end full-stack features usingPython, FastAPI, React, and Next.js, Strong experience with PostgreSQL and vector databases, Experience building cache mechanisms, session management, multi-tenant systems, and real-time application behaviors usingRedis or similar technologies, Practical experience working with Docker, container-based applications, and Git Solid understanding of software testing fundamentals, Experience with infrastructure automation, environment configuration, and secrets management, Experience working with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP); Azure experience is a strong plus, Strong knowledge of web security best practices, Familiarity with LLMs, NLP, and agentic AI pipelines, Experience setting up monitoring and logging systems, and familiarity withcost optimization and observability practices, Hands-on experience with LangChain and/or LangGraph (or similar LLM orchestration frameworks), Practical experience with on-prem deployment processes, includingversion, packaging, update rollouts, backup & recovery, centralized logging, licensing, networking constraints, and enterprise identity integrations. We look forward to your applications!

title: Java Software Engineer_Backend
description: Java Software Engineer (Backend) We are on a mission to help life sciences and healthcare companies focus on what matters to them while we focus on simplifying and removing the friction in shipping. We have a world-class team at Mercury Teknoloji A.Ş. in Türkiye (with offices in Izmir and Istanbul), a wholly owned subsidiary of Mercury Business Services headquartered in Boston, to develop a state-of-the-art shipping platform that provides the best user experience. Our platform will handle all time-critical and temperature-sensitive shipments as well as express package and freight shipments for life sciences and healthcare companies. We are seeking a Java Software Engineer (Backend) who is mission-critical in developing the backend of our new shipping platform to support our product initiatives from conception through launch and subsequent iterations. Working with customers across the US, Europe, and Asia, as well as our team, you will be responsible for creating and delivering Mercury signature software products and experiences that meet Mercury clients' needs, goals, and requirements for a seamless shipment experience. You will report to the Software Engineering Manager, be a member of the cross-functional agile team, and work closely with the Engineering, Product, QA teams. You will collaborate closely with architects, developers, designers, analysts, and testers to ensure that our products are intuitive, easy to use, and convert our customers into raving fans of our shipping technology. You Will Be a part of the cross-functional agile team contributing to the implementation of Mercury’s next-generation shipment platform by designing, documenting, coding, maintaining, refactoring, fixing, testing, and enjoying what you build. Work closely with a team of Product Managers and Architects to design and implement a scalable, secure, maintainable, and well-documented API platform for our clients. Work with DevOps engineers to design and test build pipelines, and to design and help code tools and scripts for deployment processes. Collaborate with Architects and DevOps engineers to design and/or code event data collection, notifications, and filters for observability Work with architects and front-end developers to establish microservices and APIs. Collaborate with the QA team to determine the best testing strategy, toolset, and QA practices for your backend production. Work in the Backend Chapter to ensure you continuously improve implementation practices, tech stack, standards, and third-party tools across all production teams. Collaborate with the Product Team in Boston, MA, to influence product requirements and the roadmap. Work with the Engineering team to ensure technical needs are met while maintaining a strong focus on usability. Conduct developer research with the client developers of the platform and our internal team. Advocate for and be the voice of Mercury’s customers in our product development process. Distill complex problems and propose simple, elegant solutions. Create a signature experience for the Mercury shipping platform that is aligned with our brand values. You Have/are Fluent in English. Bachelor's degree in a software-focused engineering field such as Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical and Computer Engineering, or Information Systems Engineering. Excellent communication skills Ability to work with other developers and assist team members. Passion for learning and researching. Stay updated with the latest industry trends and technologies to ensure our applications are current and competitive. Min +3 to 6 years of experience in backend development with Java, with at least 2+ years using version 9+ Strong core Java fundamentals Minimum 2 years of recent experience with Spring Boot / Spring. Proficiency with Spring Data, Hibernate, and JPA Experience with unit testing and test-driven development Experience in code review (both as a reviewer and developer) and a willingness to participate. Familiarity with Git and distributed version control systems. Knowledge of RESTful API design and implementation. Knowledge of backend architectural design concepts. Proven experience with microservices architecture. Experience with Kafka for messaging and streaming. Understanding of database technologies, particularly PostgreSQL. Profound understanding of basic development technologies like OAuth, REST, JWT. Understanding of OOP principles and solid algorithms and problem-solving skills. Experience building large-scale backends with supporting developer portals/marketplaces. Good understanding of lean/agile values, principles, and associated practices. Good understanding of Linux operating system shell commands and scripting. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices. Optimize application performance, scalability, and reliability. Mentor and guide junior engineers, fostering a collaborative and knowledge-sharing environment. Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently and in a team. Ability to prioritize customer needs and deliver promptly. We Appreciate It As a Bonus If You Have Master or higher studies in Computer Science, Software Engineering or related fields. Experience with other databases or data storage technologies and NoSQL. Experience and deep understanding of Observability tools and systems. Knowledge of Docker and container orchestration tools (e.g., Kubernetes) Knowledge of cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) Experience with Quarkus and GraalVM ecosystem We Offer Competitive salary in USD. Remote work in working hours in Turkey. Private health insurance covers you and your immediate family. 20 days of paid holidays including the first year of employment. Having your birthdays off work.
